PLACEHOLDER MEDIA DIRECTORY
===========================

Drop your media assets here and reference them in ad configs.

Supported files:
  - .jpg / .jpeg
  - .png
  - .webp
  - .mp4 (for background video loops)

Common file names used in configs:
  - logo.png          → brand.logoPath
  - hero.jpg          → media.heroImage
  - screenshot.jpg    → media.appScreenshots[0]
  - screenshot2.jpg   → media.appScreenshots[1]

In ad config files, reference assets with the path:
  "/public/images/placeholder/logo.png"

Then uncomment the relevant line in your AdConfig.
